programme.title: Bryan Johnson

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Halsey discusses her friendship with John Mayer, breaks down spooky New Jersey lore and admits that she was more nervous for "Hot Ones" than her own album release.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joey "CoCo" Diaz Breaks Out the Blue Cheese While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As he sweats profusely through the pain, Joey Diaz manages to deliver some incredible anecdotes about getting bitten by dogs and eating edibles with Bert Kreischer's dad.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Paul Rudd Does a Historic Dab While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: One of the nicest dudes in Hollywood takes on some of the least nice hot sauces on the planet. Paul Rudd breaks down the alternate "Anchorman" script, shares his love for David Letterman and improvises a tearful scene inspired by the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Rich Brian Experiences Peak Bromance While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As he faces down sauces like Extreme Karma and Da Bomb, Brian discusses touring with Joji, his bromance with Post Malone and the finer points of fanny pack fashion.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Elizabeth Olsen Feels Brave While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Elizabeth Olsen is an actress from "Wind River," "Ingrid Goes West" and the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Rob Lowe Ruins Thanksgiving By Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Hollywood vet Rob Lowe takes on the wings of death and discusses "West Wing" lore, comedy legends and the most overrated Thanksgiving sides.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Malcolm Gladwell Hits the Tipping Point While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Malcolm Gladwell is the author of five NYT bestsellers, including 'The Tipping Point,' 'Blink' and 'Outliers.'

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: David Harbour Feels Out of Control While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: David Harbour is an Emmy- and Tony-nominated actor taking on the wings of death and discusses everything from Shakespeare to penguins to underground poker clubs.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Big Sean Goes On a Spiritual Journey While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Big Sean and Sean hang out over hot wings. The Detroit emcee discusses ranch life with Kanye West, breaks down hip-hop's love of Stan Van Gundy and struggles to maintain his Buddha-like calm.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Jessica Alba Applies Lip Gloss While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jessica Alba is an actress whose career checks every box, from big budget blockbusters to TV cult classics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Rippon Competes in the Olympics of Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: With millions of Scovilles coursing through his veins, Rippon shares behind-the-scenes stories from PyeongChang, reveals the magical powers of In-N-Out burgers and judges a very special "Hot Ones" free-skate routine from Sean Evans.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Marques Brownlee Ranks Hot Sauce Labels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: During the spice storm, Marques Brownlee breaks down his pro Ultimate Frisbee career, offers sensible headphone advice and provides some scorching breakfast-cereal takes.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Derrick Lewis Is Not Okay While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "The Black Beast" tries to withstand body blows and head kicks from the wings of death. Along the way, the Houston native discusses golf, turkey legs and the art of knocking people out.

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: Jerry Falk (Jason Biggs), a young writer in New York City, leaves his girlfriend for free-spirited Amanda (Christina Ricci). Seeking advice, Jerry turns to an older, struggling artist who helps him deal with his messy love life.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Moss becomes a celebrity by beating all the records on a popular puzzle show.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Douglas becomes a Spaceologist, Roy's life is changed, and Jen gets involved with a rock band.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien's long-lost daughter is discovered and Sharon and Tracey want to arrange a meeting.

programme.title: It's A Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: A visit to a natural history museum proves catastrophic for two rival teens when an ancient statue casts a spell that causes them to switch bodies.

programme.title: Huge Davies: The Carpark
programme.desc: Huge Davies (Roast Battle, Cats Does Countdown) presents his first comedy special ‘The Carpark'. Dark humour, surreal material and a one-of-a-kind customised keyboard, Huge has risen to become one of the most unique & hilarious acts in stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Conan O Brien TV
programme.desc: Conan boldly goes into the final frontier of comedy with this look at the beloved science fiction franchise Star Trek.

programme.title: Kid's Mom Gets Accused of Gold Digging
programme.desc: Single mom Angela hides her son from her wealthy boyfriend, Edgar, fearing his family's judgment. When forced to meet, Angela defends herself against his mom's accusations, only to discover Edgar's own secret. Ultimately, love triumphs over lies.

programme.title: Mean Teacher Bans Roblox from School
programme.desc: To save her job and help Peyton, Bethany teams up with YouTuber FoltynPlays to teach via Roblox. This unconventional method boosts Peyton's grades and leads to the class's top test scores, forcing a skeptical teacher to rethink her rigid methods.

programme.title: Elf Backstabs Santa Claus on Christmas
programme.desc: Tired of being a sidekick, Buddy the Elf schemes to replace Santa but fails repeatedly. When his final prank causes Santa to quit, Buddy gets his wish but finds the job miserable. Realizing the joy is in helping, Buddy returns the stolen presents and embraces his role as Santa's helper.

programme.title: Pregnant Waitress Gets Shocking Tip
programme.desc: Heavily pregnant waitress Alice learns her husband, Harry, has untreatable cancer but refuses life-saving treatment due to the cost. Harry's former English teacher raises funds via a GoFundMe, reminding Alice that the kindness you give returns to you.

programme.title: Controlling Girlfriend Gets Dumped
programme.desc: Controlling Raji tries to change her boyfriend, John, by forcing him to diet and apply for a law firm job. John finally stands up to her, but she wins him back by offering Lakers box seats and promising to change her ways.

programme.title: Influencer Is Dumped By Famous Girlfriend
programme.desc: Desperate to revive his YouTube channel, Timmy prioritizes collabs with Allison Day over his girlfriend Trish, even missing her birthday. After hitting 10 million subs, he realizes his self-absorption, apologizes, and offers to pay for Trish's dream art school tuition and move to New York with her.

programme.title: Girlfriend Gives Guy Ultimatum
programme.desc: YouTuber Anas Marwah, struggling with confidence, breaks up with his unsupportive girlfriend, Morgan. He finds love and partnership with Asala, and together they build his channel into a massive success, buying the house Morgan claimed he'd never afford.

programme.title: Daughter Kicks Mom Out Of Wedding
programme.desc: Ellie struggles with her overbearing mom, Jackie, who's hijacking her wedding plans. Ellie nearly calls off the wedding, but a reconciliation with her mom, and a few surprise interventions, give Ellie the beautiful, personal day she always dreamed of.

programme.title: Nerd Scams Hot Girls On Dating Apps
programme.desc: Dayton catfishes Lilac to draw business to his mom's failing restaurant, attracting an influencer who exposes him. After his mom is hurt, Dayton apologizes in a viral TikTok, leading to Lilac's forgiveness and a flood of supportive customers.

programme.title: Guy Rejects Girl's New Personality
programme.desc: Carly pretends to be a helpless "girly girl" to win Lucas. He rejects her deceit, saying he misses the old her. Carly returns to her authentic self, and Lucas reveals he likes the real her, asking her to the dance.

programme.title: Girl Catches Guy Cheat On 4K Camera
programme.desc: Student journalist Tara investigates basketball star David's suspicious grades. She uncovers a cheating scandal orchestrated by the Principal, who's seeking revenge on his brother. Tara's exposé saves the team and exposes the truth.

programme.title: Best Friends' Double Date Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: After being poisoned at a bar, Bianka wakes up with amnesia. She slowly pieces together that her best friend, Jada, spiked her drink out of jealousy. Her crush, Curtis, saved her and is rewarded with a date.

programme.title: Famous Girl Pretends to Be Poor for Love
programme.desc: Korean pop star Lia, controlled by her adoptive parents, falls for Alex, a poor busboy trying to pay his mother's medical bills and a debt to a gangster. After her parents threaten her sister, Lia and Alex team up with a loyal assistant to expose the parents and the gangster.

programme.title: Toxic Boyfriend Forces Girl to Quit School
programme.desc: Anaya rejects her fiancé Varun and family to pursue surgery over marriage. 20 years later, as a top surgeon, she is asked to save the life of her now-impoverished ex-fiancé. She agrees, proving the worth of her dreams and the power of her success.

programme.title: Billionaire Dates Poor Person for Publicity
programme.desc: Struggling actress Olivia lands a lead role and dates her wealthy costar, Colin, as part of a plan to secure her family's future. She eventually realizes she's falling for his humble bodyguard, Henry, and breaks up with Colin to pursue real love and her dreams.

programme.title: Nerd Goes on a Date with Hot Girl
programme.desc: Felix pays Mac to learn manipulative pickup tactics to win Teresa. Mac's advice fails, but Felix succeeds by being himself. Mac's schemes backfire when his crush rejects him and his car is towed, proving that playing games only gets you played.

programme.title: The Elephant Princess, Season 1 S01 E24
programme.desc: Just when Vashan prepares for his coronation, he discovers Diva has magical powers, but too late: she throws him in the dungeon. When Omar and while he flees Kuru find out, she tries to kill them, but Anala saves them by transportation to the Wilson home. Alex uses magic to cure Omar's wound.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E19 The Gracie Code Pt 1
programme.desc: Lewis continues to search for clues to the magical effects of the moon pool. He discovers someone called Max Hamilton did research fifty years ago on the strange properties of Mako Island. Lewis tracks the old man down. Max is cagey and plays a cat and mouse game with Lewis. But it becomes clear the old guy knows a lot more about mermaids than Lewis first thought.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E20 The Gracie Code Pt 2
programme.desc: Lewis searches through a research folder on mermaids given to him by Max, somewhere in the research lies a clue to how all this happened. Charlotte becomes jealous of how much time Lewis is spending with his ex-girlfriend Cleo. When Charlotte visits Cleo, she sees a picture of Gracie on the wall and recognises her as her grandmother!

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E21 And Then There Were Four
programme.desc: The girls want Lewis to destroy Max's research folder Charlotte is getting too close. Reluctant to give it up, Lewis decides to take it back where it belongs - to Max. Suspicious, Charlotte follows Lewis to Max Hamilton. Max tells all to Charlotte when he discovers she's the granddaughter of his one true love - Gracie.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E22 Bubble Bubble Toil and Trouble
programme.desc: There's a fourth mermaid in town - Charlotte! Emma, Rikki and Cleo reluctantly have to deal with the newcomer. Charlotte is overjoyed, thinking this is the best thing that's ever happened to her. No matter how much they all try to explain how tricky it is being a mermaid, Charlotte won't listen.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E23 Reckless
programme.desc: Nate bullies Lewis, pretty much because he can, and when Nate's jet-ski is damaged he blames Lewis, demanding payment. Meanwhile Emma, Rikki and Cleo continue to have problems accommodating Charlotte as a mermaid, she won't listen to any advice. Charlotte takes their attempt to help as an attempt to boss her around.

programme.title: H2O
programme.sub-title: Just add Water, Season 2 S02 E24 Three's Company
programme.desc: It's Lewis's birthday. Cleo and the others have some ideas how to celebrate but Charlotte quickly takes over and organises a surprise party for Lewis. Charlotte's plans don't seem to be about Lewis and Rikki eventually has enough and leaves. The party is at Charlotte's house with all of Charlotte's friends.

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: The girls find some turtle eggs on Dolphin City beach: they are too fragile to move, so they take turns watching over them till they hatch. But that's not counting with Miriam and Zane – who are having a beach party!! Meanwhile, underwater, Bernie, cannot bear all the noise and disruption his neighbors are making, and decides to leave his cave and go and stay elsewhere for a bit of a rest.

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: The White Mermaid is in danger! Her sanctuary, the sunken galleon of Edward the Cruel, is about to be discovered by Stanley Finch, the famous explorer. The girls decide to stop him, and make his boat take another course, towards the sinister underwater stone circle.

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: After being carried by a current into the underwater stone circle, Rikki is victim of a terrible spell: she cannot turn back into a human! To break the spell, she has to wait for the full moon – in three days' time!

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: The Bay prepares for a great excitement: there's soon to be the first great robotics competition organized by the Dolphin City University. The events will take place underwater, and Lewis wants badly to win first prize: enrolment in the Science Faculty! Unfortunately, Zane is also participating, and true to form, can only do it by cheating.

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: Emma's kid brother Elliott happened to see Rikki's mermaid tail in the water! He starts telling everyone he's seen a sea monster. To cover up, the girls and Lewis start building a fake monster, to make people think it was all a hoax. But it's too late – the whole town's out looking for the famous “Dolphin City Monster”.

programme.title: H2O
programme.desc: The Vandals are carrying out a nasty plan: they have enlisted a terrible horde of stinging jellyfish to sow terror in the Bay. But the mermaids aren't able to respond: Rikki grounded, wrongly accused of calling in a fire alarm at school, and Cleo has to help care for swimmers stung by the jellies.

programme.title: Wolfblood S01 E10
programme.desc: Maddy, Rhydian, Tom and Shannon are playing in the woods when Tom notices someone spying on them. Maddy and Rhydian catch their scent - the wild wolfblood is back... Bernie, who owns the local village shop, fills them in about a homeless women who has been sleeping rough in the woods.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Kim's Fairytale Wedding: A Kardashian Event, Pt. 3
programme.desc: Kim's decision to uninvite Khloe from her wedding leaves the sisters at odds with each other--and Khloe considers skipping the big bachelorette party in Vegas. Meanwhile, Kim's fiance Kris questions whether it's a good idea to hold his bachelor party the same weekend in the same city--and starts getting stressed out over all the wedding plans and media attention. Plus, Kim surprises all of her family and friends when she announces her plans to change her last name to Humphries after the wedding.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: Kim's Fairytale Wedding: A Kardashian Event, Pt. 4
programme.desc: Amid all of the chaos and stress of planning their wedding, Kim and Kris begin to get on each other's nerves--and even sit at separate tables at their rehearsal dinner! Regardless, Kim continues to ponder whether she's willing to take Humphries as her last name. Plus, handling all of the last minute wedding details has left her on the verge of a nervous breakdown--and she realizes how much she misses having her biological father be a part of the festivities. Finally, the big day arrives, and Kim ultimately gets her dream fairytale wedding complete with a grand walk down the aisle, three stunning bridal gowns, a romantic first dance and so much more.

programme.title: Thad & Sara
programme.desc: Thaddius sought refuge from his struggling marriage through an online relationship with Sara. When she starts telling tales of seizures and kidnappings, he starts to question her identity.

programme.title: Andria & David
programme.desc: David is the only love Andria has ever known. Love letters and voice messages make Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, she needs to know what he is hiding that keeps him away.

programme.title: Ayissha & Sydney
programme.desc: Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: In this episode of Honesty Box, the wonderful M answers the questions you wanted to know about a career in stripping. She discusses her weirdest clients and requests and gives her thoughts on whether stripping can be degrading to women.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sit down with Amber Currah to talk about the devastating impact of her near-decade-long addiction to Ketamine. She bravely talks about her low points and her recovery, as well as the serious consequences drug use has had on her bladder.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Rob Parkes, a domestic abuse survivor whose ex-wife was labelled the 'Black Widow' by the media, tells us how she tried to convince five different men to violently murder him and reveals the recording which led to her nine-year jail conviction.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode, ex-career criminal John Burton, a.k.a 'Juice Bomb John', recounts how he began a life of crime in the 90's Liverpool rave scene, smuggled millions of pounds worth of black market goods into the UK, and reformed to develop an app helping people find work after leaving the prison system.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Patrick Foster's gambling addiction had catastrophic consequences on his career and family life. Here, he tells us about his internal battle with addiction, the millions he's placed in bets, and the vast sums of debt that he racked up as a result.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Nathalie Schöffmann recounts her experience of surviving a kidnapping after being attacked and bundled into the boot of a car while out cycling. She describes the conversation that helped her to escape and why she has empathy for her kidnapper.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Rachel Williams survived 18 years of domestic abuse at the hands of her husband, Darren. She tells us how his manipulation and coercive control quickly developed into violent attacks, but highlights that there can be life after domestic abuse.

programme.title: Honesty Box: Episode 40
programme.desc: Former royal butler Grant Harrold answers anonymous questions, revealing what life is really like inside the Royal Family, from daily routines and etiquette to behind-the-scenes stories and misconceptions about the monarchy.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Raphael Rowe, an innocent man wrongfully imprisoned for murder.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Pam Fraser, a nudist, who tells us all about the advantages of living a naked life.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: UFC Star Alexander Volkanovski joins us for Snack Wars: UK v Australia. The fighter reveals the proper way to eat TimTams, faces off with the legendary Vegemite, and tries some UK flavours like Gentleman's Relish and pickled onion Space Raiders. Former footballers, Real Madrid Galáctico star Roberto Carlos and Arsenal Invincible player Gilberto Silva, try Pimm's for the first time with Caipirinha cocktails, compare British and Brazilian beer and share their love for Frazzles and Torresmos.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Anya Taylor-Joy and Alexander Skarsgård choose between UK and Swedish vegan snacks in this entertaining episode of Snack Wars! They compare Greggs sausage rolls to Swedish meatballs and fruit gums to a Swedish snack called Djungelvrål. Zac Efron and Ryan Kiera Armstrong compare UK and USA snacks! Zac has a hilarious reaction to Toxic Waste, Ryan tries her first-ever Twinkie, and they both can't get enough of British snacks!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Noah Beck takes on the ultimate UK vs USA taste test! He falls head over heels for Maltesers, bravely tackles a very British saveloy, and gets hit with pure nostalgia reminiscing about Hershey's Kisses and classic Combos pizza bites. Macaulay Culkin puts snacks from UK & USA to the test, tucking into nuclear-bomb proof Twinkies, pitting Pot Noodle against Kraft Mac and Cheese (*his Mom's recipe), and gives British cheese the thumbs up. But which country's snacks will win?

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Ryan Gosling finds a unique way to try British and Canadian snacks, sharing some hilarious opinions on British classics and having a great time eating a Tunnocks tea cake! Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Brian Tyree Henry compare UK and USA snacks! Brian has an amazing reaction to Jaffa Cakes, Aaron straight-arms squeezy cheese and they both declare their love for Krispy Kremes.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur football player Son Heung-min joins us for a game of Snack Wars: UK v Korea! The Premier League legend tells us which of his teammates he would share his candy with, tries pickled onions, and discovers what Tottenham cake is! James McAvoy puts snacks from both England and Scotland to the test in LADbible's Snack Wars! The actor compares the likes of espresso martinis and pork pies to deep-fried Mars bars and haggis.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The hilarious Stephen Graham decides which region of the UK has the better snacks... North or South? He has a great time sampling the likes of saveloy, gingerbread and jellied eels and sparks the age-old debate about the pronunciation of 'scone'. Singer and songwriter Burna Boy tries some of Britain's most iconic meals in Snack Wars, comparing them to foods from his birthplace of Nigeria. He tackles cauliflower cheese, recalls the time Pot Noodle 'saved his life' and drinks a lot of Pimm's.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Paul Mescal and his Aftersun co-star Frankie Corio compare UK and Irish snacks! Paul introduces Frankie to some Irish snacks, including a Tayto sandwich and Ballymaloe Relish, and neither enjoyed an iconic British spread!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Niall Horan compares Irish and British snacks and has an incredible time pouring the PERFECT pint of Guinness and recounts a hilarious story involving Lewis Capaldi and Buckfast!

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: George finds the opportunity to ruin a business rival and the Poldarks too in the process.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: The Poldark's vacation in the capital gives rise to deadly complications.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Cornwall's upcoming election threatens the status quo.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Ross faces the challenge of Parliament and the Warleggans refuse to accept defeat.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Ross is reunited with his family at home, but tragedy strikes in Cornwall.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: George increases the strain on struggling poor, driving Ross to make a risky gambit.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise: Dawn
programme.desc: A solo mission goes wrong when Trip and an alien enemy are forced to land on the dark side of a moon. Now they must work together in order to survive the imminent sunrise.

programme.title: Warehouse 13: Merge With Caution
programme.desc: Pete and Myka unwittingly activate an artefact that causes them to swap bodies, and Claudia has to take control when she joins Artie on a case involving an object of seduction.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Rapid Response
programme.desc: Officers in Wales discover a car containing guns during a routine stop, and booze-fuelled brawls on Saturday night take the rapid response cops out of their cars and onto the streets.

programme.title: Caribbean Cops
programme.desc: Two sassy ladies get more than they bargained for when they go souvenir shopping.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Senior Constables Ash and Paul are patrolling residential streets when they witness a driver undertaking a dangerous burnout in front of them, and Senior Constable Matt saves an injured dog in danger of straying onto the road.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Senior Constable Pete Henry follows a smoke trail to find a Volkswagen Beetle on fire on the side of the motorway.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: A Mexican chef is undone by his phone messages, which shed light on his dealings. A Chinese businessman struggles with the truth, and some Kiwis return home, bringing with them some questionable trophies.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Christchurch Customs discover a Bible filled with more than the word of God, while in Queenstown, border staff take a tour of a makeshift tobacco importing ring.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Following New Zealand's highway patrol officers from around the country, as they keep an eye on the most heavily populated roads for accidents and issues.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E8
programme.desc: Teenager Liza Randall interviews Darrin about his career in advertising for a school newspaper. After Darrin takes Liza to the agency on Saturday, Liza's jealous boy friend, Marvin "Monster" Grogan, visits Samantha. Monster, a football star, wants to batter Darrin. Samantha, stuffing Monster with food, explains the innocence of Darrin and Lisa's relationship, although she knows Liza is more than interested in Darrin. At the office, Liza pours drinks. Liza and Darrin are doused when Darrin tries to take the drink away from her. Darrin escapes an awkward situation when boss Larry Tate arrives with two prospective clients . Meanwhile, Monster takes a romantic interest in Samantha. Darrin and Liza arrive, reeking of liquor. Darrin accuses Samantha of playing up to Monster. Samantha taunts him about Liza. However, when Monster winds up to clout Darrin, he bruises his hands on the invisible shield Samantha has created. When Liza slaps Darrin, however, Samantha lets him get the full force of the blow. Later Samantha removes her own protective shield when Darrin tries to make up.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E9
programme.desc: Darrin's workload piles sky-high when Larry Tate and his wife Louise fly to Paris to cover the fashion showings- for a client. Samantha spends most of the time alone playing solitaire. She accepts Endora's invitation to fly to Paris, without a plane, of course, for lunch. In Paris, Samantha and Endora run into the Tates. Larry is surprised, phones Darrin that Samantha and her mother are in Paris with them. Samantha returns home immediately. Darrin tells Samantha their marriage is a mistake, since he has taken her away from all the high living she seems to love. Although Samantha tries to convinces Darrin that he is wrong, she angrily leaves, and returns to Paris. Larry Tate tells Darrin Samantha is lonesome for him. Darrin decides to follow her to Paris. After several unsuccessful tries, Samantha gets on Darrin's plane, and they arrive in Paris together.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E10
programme.desc: Endora tells Samantha that Maurice, her father, is coming to visit. Endora warns Samantha that Maurice will be furious when he learns his daughter has married a mortal. Samantha, determined to stand up to her father, gets Darrin to stay in town on the night Maurice calls. Samantha tells Maurice that her husband is in Washington. The conversation about Darrin proceeds nicely until Maurice surmises Darrin is a mortal. Meanwhile, Darrin, who has been drinking with Larry Tate, phones Samantha and tells her he is coming home. When Darrin arrives, Maurice's fury hits its peak. Al-though Maurice admires Darrin's courage in facing up to him, he makes him disappear. Samantha, expressing her love for Darrin, pleads with Maurice to bring him back. Even Endora joins in Samantha's pleas. Although he tells them it will be extremely difficult, Maurice makes Darrin reappear. Before leaving, Maurice joins his family in a champagne toast. Im-pressed by the rare vintage, Maurice feels Darrin might be one of them after all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E11
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E12
programme.desc: Larry and Louise Tate have been married for sixteen years and have no children. Louise asks Samantha to go with her to an obstetrician as tests have shown she is going to be a mother. Louise tells Samantha she is afraid to tell Larry since she believes he hates children. Larry, visiting his dentist at the medical center, sees Louise and Samantha enter the obstetrician's office. Thinking Samantha is going to have a baby, he tells Darrin, but cautions him not to say anything until Samantha tells him. In a reverie, Darrin visualizes his children as little witches. He comes to with a sinking feeling. Samantha invites the Tates to dinner. Both Larry and Darrin hover over Samantha, warning her not to exert herself. Louise is all but forgotten, but makes several unsuccessful attempts to tell Larry that he is to be a father. Finally, Samantha tells Larry. He is overjoyed. Although Darrin doesn't tell Samantha about his reverie, he is reassured when she tells him she hopes they have a child who looks just like him.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E13
programme.desc: Samantha's friend, Gertrude, a nice, plain-looking girl expresses her envy of the happiness Samantha has found in marriage. Although Darrin tries to avoid getting mixed up in matchmaking, Samantha persuades him to bring Kermit, a handsome artist, home to dinner to meet Gertrude. Kermit falls for Gertrude. Although Samantha will mot admit it, Darrin suspects Gertrude is a witch and tries to break up her romance with Kermit. Darrin arranges a meeting at a nightspot for Kermit with Susan, a former girl friend. There, Samantha uses witchcraft to get Susan into an argument with Kermit. Susan storms out, unable to recall what has happened. When Gertrude arrives, according to Samantha's plan, Kermit proposes to her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E14
programme.desc: Darrin's parents pay their first visit to the Stephens home, Darrin's mother, Phyllis, hopes to find that his wife is a poor housekeeper. Soon after, Samantha's Aunt Clara comes down the chimney for an unexpected visit. Darrin is worried about the kind of impression Aunt Clara will make on his parents, but agrees with Samantha that they must make Aunt Clara feel welcome. Determined to help Samantha make a hit with her in-laws, Aunt Clara uses her witchcraft to whip up a feast for dinner. Thinking that Samantha has done the cooking, Phyllis becomes quite upset. Although Samantha warns him to be tactful, Darrin makes Aunt Clara feel she is not wanted. After Aunt Clara's de-parture, Samantha gets into an argument with Darrin, during which Phyllis learns Aunt Clara cooked the dinner. When Samantha admits she is not a good housekeeper, Phyllis, who felt she was being pushed aside, knows she is going to love her daughter-in-law. Darrin persuades Aunt Clare to return and the evening ends happily for all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E15
programme.desc: Seven year old Tommy, who lives in an orphanage, is happy to spend Christmas with Gladys and Abner Kravitz. Six year old Michael, also an orphan, derides Tommy's belief is Santa Claus. When Samantha and Darrin bring him home for the holidays, their efforts to get Michael to share in the festivities of the season fail. After Michael admits he would believe in Santa Claus if he really existed, Samantha takes Michael and Darrin on her broomstick to the North Pole, where Michael meets Santa Claus. Later, back at home Darrin and Michael awake. Although both feel they have dreamed the trip, Michael now believes in Santa Claus. Gladys overhears Michael tell Tommy he has met Santa Claus. When she tries to pin Tommy down, he denies that Michael had ever mentioned it. Mrs. Grange, the director of the orphanage, comes to the Stephens home with George and Sarah Johnson. At the Kravitz home, both Gladys and Abner, who are about to return Tommy to the orphanage, express their wish to have someone like Tommy permanently. When Michael leaves with Mr. and Mrs. Johnson, Samantha and Darrin know Michael has found two loving parents.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E16
programme.desc: The members of the Hospital Fund Auxiliary appoint Samantha Entertainment Chairman for the group's bazaar. Limited to spending fifty dollars, Samantha hires Zeno, a broken down magician who has taken to drink. Because of this, his assistant, Roxie Ames, has left the act. Using her gift of magic, Samantha makes Zeno the hit of the show. As a result, Zeno gets a job on TV. Zeno pleads with Samantha to help him. Assisted by Samantha, Zeno runs through a very successful rehearsal. Just before the show goes on the air, Roxie appears and injects herself into the act. Hogging the show, Roxie kills Zeno' s act and his con-fidence. She admits she returned just to get a regular spot on TV herself. Samantha turns Roxie into a comic prop for Zeno. After Zeno's successful performance, Darrin tells Samantha that his client has booked Zeno for the next thirteen weeks. Darrin attempts some magic on his own. When he succeeds, he is not certain whether his skill or Samantha's is responsible.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E17
programme.desc: Darrin sprains his ankle and is confined to bed with his foot in a cast. Wearying of running up and down stairs on errands for Darrin, Samantha suggests he use her power of witchcraft during the emergency. Endora warns Samantha that she is making a mistake. After his initial wishes are granted, Darrin, as Endora had predicted, becomes drunk with power. After showering Samantha with gifts, Darrin not only decides to use his power to get a larger home, but also tells Larry Tate, his boss, that he is retiring so that he and Samantha can take a trip around the world. Samantha's initial plan to stop Darrin by showering him with new luxuries fails. Then Darrin gives Samantha flowers and a wristwatch he has purchased with his own money. From Samantha's happy reaction, Darrin realizes these gifts mean more to her than all the others. Samantha happily agrees to his request that she take back his powers of witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E18
programme.desc: After arranging to meet Samantha to celebrate their six month anniversary, Darrin arrives at his office to meet Margaret Marshall, chairman of the board of a cosmetics firm. Margaret, a stunning woman in her late thirties, successful both with men and in business, insists that Darrin fly to Chicago that night to complete the quarter million dollar campaign he had planned for her company. Fumbling out of the anniversary arrangements with Samantha, Darrin flies to Chicago and meets Margaret, who has become quite interested in him, aboard her yacht. There, Darrin sees a cat and feels it may be Samantha, egged on by her mother, Endora, to fly to Chicago to check on his activities. While Darrin evades Margaret's advances, a pelican arrives on the scene. Although both Margaret and Captain Kelly feel there is something strange in Darrin's reactions to the animals, Margaret, realizing Darrin is truly in love with his wife, ac-cepts his advertising campaign. Greeted by Samantha at home, Darrin is reassured that the cat he has brought with him is not his wife. However, when the pelican arrives, Darrin is uncertain whether it might not be Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E19
programme.desc: After Endora promises to curb her witchery for the even-ing, Samantha arranges a dinner for Darrin's parents and her mother to meet. Darrin is fearful of the results. Father Stephens has just retired and feels lost and insecure. Endora, being utterly charming, as she has promised Samantha, plays up to Father. Father once more feels life is worth living, but Mother Stephens becomes jealous. Before Mother is through, she is sure Endora wants to take Father from her. She asks Darrin for the name of a divorce lawyer. Darrin and Samantha work feverishly to save the marriage. Despite their efforts, Mother takes a train to Arizona and Father boards a plane on the first step of a world trip. Samantha asks Endora's help. Using her witchcraft, Endora brings both plane and train to Angel Falls, where Father had proposed to Mother years before. In the romantic setting, both realize they are much younger than they thought.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E20
programme.desc: When Darrin refuses to allow Samantha to act as matron of honor at cousin's wedding in Egypt, Endora tells him he's in trouble. Immediately Darrin starts having problems with his campaign to get the Woolfe Brothers Department Store account. despite Darrin's protests, Larry Tate gives him an assistant. The assistant, young Gideon Whitsett, soon maneuvers himself into being regarded as a brilliant young man. On the make, Gideon soon has Woolfe looking to him for ideas, which he has stolen from Darrin. Darrin is sure that Gideon is a warlock whom Endora has assigned to take his job. When everything else fails, Samantha decides to stop Gideon herself. Using witchcraft, Samantha gets Gideon to reveal the ruthless maneuvers he has been using to get Darrin's job. Darrin, who overhears the conversation, finally realizes Gideon is not a warlock. A right to the jaw puts Gideon out of action. His confidence restored, Darrin sells Mr. Woolfe on his idea for a successful campaign.

programme.title: The Flight Of The Valkyrie

programme.title: The Prisoners Prisoner

programme.title: Movies Are Your Best Escape

programme.title: Go Light On The Heavy Water

programme.title: Happiness Is A Warm Sergeant

programme.title: The Scientist
programme.desc: Corporal LeBeau pretends to be a visiting French scientist while Hogan smuggles out the real one.

programme.title: Hogans Hofbrau
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit.

programme.title: Oil For The Lamps Of Hogan

programme.title: Skins

programme.title: Skins
programme.desc: Effy and Freddie are living together but Freddie is troubled by Effy's morbid outlook and her obsession with death.

programme.title: Skins
programme.desc: JJ falls for Lara, who works in the sweet shop with him, but when he visits her flat, he discovers that she is a single parent.

programme.title: Skins

programme.title: Most Shocking

programme.title: Gharwali Pedwali
programme.desc: Laugh-out-loud comedy and entertaining domestic scenarios unfold as family members create chaos and fun.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.5
programme.desc: Minsik tries to use Sangchun to cut off Ije's hand, but Ije persuades Sangchun, saying that he will help Sangchun meet his daughter. Meanwhile, Sogeum finds out that Ije injected a drug into Bit before he disappeared.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.6
programme.desc: Ije plans to get Seokwoo released by making it seem like he has Wilson's disease. Meanwhile, Uisik goes to Jeonghui, suspecting collusion between her and Ije.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.7
programme.desc: Ije, Hyesu, Sangchun, and Jeonghui begin to plan a way to retaliate against Minsik. Minsik tells Jaejun that Ije will be investigated and sets a trap to hunt him down.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.8
programme.desc: Minsik gets investigated on suspicion of breaking the Pharmacy Law and realizes that this was part of Ije's plan. Meanwhile, Ije gets appointed as the new medical director of West Seoul Prison.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.9
programme.desc: Sogeum is surprised to see Jaejun in Bit's video treatment file. Minsik approaches Uisik with information to take Ije down.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.10
programme.desc: Ije tells Minsik to hand over Haeun Hospital to him. Meanwhile, Sogeum gets a call from Bit and goes to meet him.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.11
programme.desc: Jaejun goes to the front of Ije's house to catch Bit, and Sogeum goes to stop him. Meanwhile, Ije gets a call saying that Congressman Jung collapsed.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.19
programme.desc: Ji Young, while preparing for Miss Universe, falls into contemplation as she sees other candidates pursuing their dreams. Ji Young takes sweet revenge on Manager Park, who visits her regarding a Dream Department Store advertisement model issue, thinking back on past times. Hwa Jung, learning that Teacher Jung has put her house up for sale to raise investment for new cosmetics, wavers over the issue of studying abroad.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.20
programme.desc: Hyung Joon promises Ji Young that he will always be by her side.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.1
programme.desc: Lee Gun, the 22nd heir of the Jeonju Lee clan and ninth-generation only son, is a young CEO soaring at Jangin Chemicals. But his biggest worry: every male ancestor has died before turning 30. As relatives pressure him to marry and produce an heir, he prepares a ring to propose to his long-time girlfriend, Se Ra. Meanwhile, Kim Mi Young, a temp office assistant at a law firm, drops by a candy shop on an errand and runs into Gun by chance—how will their first meeting unfold?

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.2
programme.desc: Falling for a scheme by President Park and Mr. Choi to trap Lee Gun, Mi Young unknowingly drinks a spiked beverage and enters the wrong hotel room having also drunk the spiked drink, Lee Gun walks into the same room. Mistaking each other for Attorney Min and Se Ra, the two spend a fateful night together.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.3
programme.desc: Back in her hometown, Mi Young is shocked to learn she's pregnant—and her mother finds out, too. Lee Gun heads to Mi Young's mom's ssambap restaurant with President Park. Yong plays a video of Lee Gun and Mi Young—found on Gun's USB—for Chairwoman Wang, but her unexpected reaction throws him off. Meanwhile, Mi Young goes alone to the OB-GYN clinic, where she meets Daniel.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.4
programme.desc: Disheartened after repeated failures to find his sister, Daniel is in a slump. Through Chief Tak, Gun learns about a mysterious stimulant. Mi Young moves into Gun's lavish home, but finds herself caught between Gun's coldness and the chairwoman's kindness.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.5
programme.desc: Startled by Gun's sudden chill after the wedding, Mi Young is taken aback when he even presents divorce papers. To steady him, Chairwoman Wang recommends a prenatal class for Mi Young, and Gun reluctantly attends. Meanwhile, Gun bumps into Daniel and Mi Young at the chairwoman's house.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.1
programme.desc: A farewell party is being held in Marketing Team 3. But who is the guest of honor? Na Mu-myeong, the "invisible man" assistant manager who lacks any presence wherever he goes. For him, a man destined to live up to his name—"Mu-myeong" (meaning nameless)—and for the rest of Marketing Team 3, who repeat the same mundane routines every day, a wave of change begins to stir.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.2
programme.desc: Meanwhile, after being rejected by Kang-mi, Matan hears that her ideal type is ‘Kim Jong-kook.' Determined to win her over, he sets out on a mission to transform himself into Kang-mi's dream man.Sang-sik's reputation within Gaus is a total disaster. Both to Manager Wi and the Marketing Team 3 members, Sang-sik is nothing more than the "dim-witted but kind-hearted" guy. Narae begins to put in the effort to give Sang-sik a complete image makeover.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.3
programme.desc: "Nothing can stop them now. Sang-sik and Narae have finally moved from the '3.9' stage to a full-on '4'—becoming an official couple. Even Narae, who used to be so passive, has completely transformed! They thought it would be all lovey-dovey from here on out, but an unexpected turn of events awaits them. Matan, who went as far as using his housing deposit to put up a streetlight for Kang-mi, suddenly finds himself homeless and penniless. While Matan tracks down Sang-sik for help, his fiancée, Aurora, is hot on his trail."

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.4
programme.desc: "Sang-sik and Narae are now in the 'some' stage. Worried that their budding romance might be discovered by their teammates, Sang-sik plans a secret date for Narae, who is constantly anxious about being found out. “How am I supposed to survive on this?!” Shocked by his pittance of a first paycheck, Matan embarks on an authentic working-class experience with Kang-mi. Matan wants to give a gift to someone he's grateful to in celebration of receiving his first paycheck… But who will receive Matan's gift?!"

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.5
programme.desc: They say kids these days start with a kiss, but even after kissing twice, Sang-sik and Narae still haven't figured out exactly where they stand. What should we call this ambiguous relationship of ours? Meanwhile, Marketing Division 3 is taking on its first major project! Having heard the rumor that if Hyung-mi smiles, the project will be a huge success, the team members are going all out to make her laugh.Ever since witnessing Kang-mi's 17-to-1 fight, Ma-tan's heart has been racing uncontrollably. Carrying an emotion she can't quite pinpoint—whether it's fear or excitement—she sets off on a business trip with Sang-sik.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.6
programme.desc: There's a spy among us! Matang senses that someone is leaking information to Baek Jo-won. Whether it was the alcohol or the medication, Sang-sik and Narae ended up kissing in a completely absurd moment. But after the kiss, Sang-sik not only sent the worst possible text—‘I'm sorry'—but also went on a blind date! Narae finds out and is furious. While observing the team members, he accidentally overhears Kang-mi's phone call… Could Kang-mi, whom he trusted, be the spy?

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.7
programme.desc: Narae is so annoyed with herself for getting along better with Sang-sik that she could die, but every time she gets close to him, she ends up with a bloody nose, bruises all over her body, and now even a cast... Fearing she might actually die if this keeps up, Narae issues a restraining order against Sang-sik. While Aziz is nursing her back to health, Narae discovers something and is shocked. ‘I used to dream of becoming a novelist.' They say a person's name reflects their nature—Literature got into big trouble for writing her written apology like a novel. She tries to make up for her mistake by hosting a Gauss massage gun event!

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Ep.15

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: The selected young masters are invited to attend the appointment ceremony of Hwarang. Queen Jiso feels shocked and betrayed to see her son, Sam Maekjong at the ceremony because she has worked so hard to protect him until now and his appearance is against her will. However, the King has decided to introduce himself to the world through joining Hwarang.

programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: Hwarang's second assignment is to give a music performance at the Thanksgiving Festival. Wooreuk, the master of instruments, visits Hwarang House as an instructor. The members practice day and night to show the amazing performance to the people and the Queen. Meanwhile, Aro goes to talk to Wooreuk after finding out that he raised her brother.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: Hwarang has practiced a lot for their performance, and everyone is expecting to watch it at the festival. However, Master Youngshil orders Banryu to ruin the performance so that the people see how unprepared and incompetent the Queen's Hwarang is. Banryu hates that he must follow the order when he wants to make it successful with other members.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: The Hwarang's performance faces an extreme crisis while Master Hwikyung visits Master Ahnji and tells him something meaningful about Queen Jiso. programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: Queen Jiso orders the Princess to get rid of Aro without anyone knowing in order to protect the King. programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the infamous tiger fish. The shoreline sights never disappoint as she witnesses lion and fish eagles on the hunt. Kristina challenges her fishing guide, Dollar, to a fishing competition and lands her biggest fish yet!

programme.title: Marine Mammals
programme.desc: From giant sperm whales to dramatic humpbacks and playful dolphins, we can't resist the endless charms of marine mammals.

programme.title: Indochina's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Indochina three ancient kingdoms, Laos, Vietnam and Cambodia, linked by one great river: the mighty Mekong. A mystical land shaped by the forces of the monsoon. A region ravaged by war but, like a Phoenix, risen from the ashes. Within its boundaries can be found one tenth of the world's species, and some of the richest ecosystems on the planet. This is the land of the Mother River, one of the most bio diverse regions on Earth.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: Zanzibar is a land of giants. Isolated from mainland Africa these islands harbour some of the most unique animals with many being the largest found anywhere in the world.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.sub-title: In the Shadows of the Volcanoes
programme.desc: The Canary Islands were born in the depths of the ocean. Forged by fire and sculpted by winds and waves, this volcanic land offers landscapes of colossal force and almost unreal beauty.

programme.title: Montenegro
programme.sub-title: From the Black Mountains to the Beach
programme.desc: The Balkan land of Montenegro owes its name to the Black Mountains. But there is so much more: steep cliffs, deep gorges, picturesque lakes, orthodox monasteries, Venetian architecture, sandy beaches and even fjords like those of Norway. There are three climate zones alone in the Adriatic. The inhabitants still try to find their way between the challenges of a post-socialist system, the much-vaunted Balkan remoteness and the opportunities of a still almost completely undiscovered tourist destination in Europe.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The Blue and White Island World of Greece: Mykonos, Naxos and Tinos
programme.desc: Around the once sacred Isle of Delos, some 200 islands, including 20 larger ones, are arranged almost in a circle. This is where the name of the Greek island paradise comes from: Cyclades, a derivation of the Greek word kýklos, circle. Each cyclade has a unique character. The pelican Petros, about 20 years old, is the mascot of Mykonos. He moves from taverna to taverna all day long, scrounging fish. This works out sometimes well and sometimes not so well. Petros does have a few human friends who regularly slip him something, but all too often visitors eager to take pictures block his path. Then he has to "wiggle" his way through the crowd. Jackie Onassis is said to have once brought Petros' "great-grandmother" from Louisiana to the island.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Santorini archipelago is a gem, but is located on a veritable powder keg. It is only a matter of time before the volcano, the crater rim of which gave us this island world, erupts again. Since January 2011, threatening rumblings have been perceived beneath the archipelago. On Santorini, it's a case of getting nowhere fast without a mule. Whether the restaurant terraces above the abyss of Oia, the hotels on the breath-taking cliffs of Imerovigli or Firostefani, it was only with the help of the stubborn climbing artists, that these daring constructions were made possible. Antonis Vlachos has ten strong mules that work for him. He transports almost everything with them: stones, food or the typically blue paint for the church domes. Santorini is a tourist magnet and up to five cruise ships call in at the islands daily. However, there is no port, just a narrow, concrete quay. Without the tender boats, no guests would ever reach the shore.

programme.title: North Macedonia: Between Traditional Dances and Mini Navy
programme.desc: Northern Macedonia emerged from being a once constituent republic of the former Yugoslavia. Anyone wishing to discover unknown worlds has every chance of finding them in this young Balkan country, full of imposing mountains, lakes of crystal-clear water, original villages and centuries-old customs. Nevertheless, Northern Macedonia, which borders Serbia in the north and Greece in the south, considered to be one of the poorest countries in Europe.

programme.title: The Turkish Riviera
programme.sub-title: The flair of antiquity and a turquoise sea
programme.desc: With a coastline boasting miles of bathing beaches, turquoise waters, breath-taking cliffs whilst being steeped in history, the Turkish riviera was even a fa-vourite of the Ancient Greeks, Romans and Ottomans, who all loved the mild climate and the lush landscape. Near the ruins of the ancient city of Side, Menderes Akdemir works on the latest attraction aimed at Riviera holidaymakers: his spooky pirate ship "Big Kral" is due to leave dry dock and head for the sea. Mehmet Özata came up with a very clever idea: to be able to cope with the basically ruinous puffer fish plague along the coastline, he produces a selection of leather utensils made of their skin. The islands that surround the sunk-en city of Simena are hugely popular, despite the very modest infrastructure and lack of shopping facilities. This is why Fatma and Ahmet Mazili have transformed their small rowing boat into a floating snack bar. An-other gap in the market was brought to life by Ufuk Secgin. He came up with the idea of providing Halal Holidays, vacations that conform to Islam. For Muslims to be able to relax on holiday, much has to be well organised, with a copy of the Koran and a prayer rug seen as the absolute minimum requirements

programme.title: Penguin City
programme.desc: In the middle of the Antarctic Ocean, an entire mountain range arises from the water: South Georgia, the nursery of the Antarctic. Hundreds of thousands of penguins, elephant seals, fur seals and their young overcrowd the beaches. The rough weather and the extremely difficult access to the island cause filmmaking to be an endeavor requiring much of the film crew around Roland Gockel and Rosie Koch and the state of the art cameras. A lot of patience and sensitivity over a period spanning some five years now offers unknown and poignant insights into the life of the King Penguins on South Georgia Island

programme.title: To the South
programme.desc: At the first part of his journey, the photographer is lucky to get some shots of rare animal species. Between the gaps of the rocky mountains he traces funny creatures: Pica. They look like a mixture between hamsters and rabbits. From his hideout Benny Rebel manages to observe impressive Ibexes, a kind of wild goats with huge horns. Equipped with a special microcopter and night shot camera traps he tries to get a sneak into the life of shy inhabitants of the steppe. In his adventure he encounters lonesome dromedary herds and discovers a spooky cave of hyenas. Rebel witnesses owls, snakes and lizards living between the antique ruins of the old Persian capital Persepolis. Benny Rebel also is interested in the relationship between men and nature. He meets not only ranger in the wild, but also visitors of the magnificent Persian gardens in the middle of rough deserts. Between the fountains of freshly sputtering water pelicans take a bath. Young and old people walk in the green paradises in front of attractive mosques. Unexpected the 43 year old photographer meets animal lovers on the roof tops of urban houses. The bet on the flying skills of their specific breed of pigeons. And like a house from a fairy tale seem the historical pigeon towers with their unique architecture housing more than ten thousands of birds. Finally Benny Rebel traces an Asiatic cheetah in the semi desert. Less than a hundred of the big cats are left in the wild. The nature conservationist and photographer decides to come closer to the dangerous carnivore.

programme.title: Europe's Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, the horrifying murder of Archbishop Thomas Becket of Canterbury led thousands of pilgrims to the south of England. Centuries later, the long-forgotten Pilgrims' Way is now enjoying a revival. The Pilgrim´s Way leads east to west cross-country from Winchester to Canterbury through the counties of Hampshire, Surrey and Kent. Along the way, modern pilgrims discover traces of the past and the pristine beauty of the land. They meet people who want to preserve England's rich natural treasures and traditions for the future.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies want to go to sleep, but Tinky Winky finds Po already asleep in his bed. So he goes to look for somewhere else to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the Teletubbies laugh. They watch some children exploring the colour green. The Teletubbies love green.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Go Buster

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games, she resorts to cheating.
