programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword. Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobots out of action, Sari assembles substitutes to take on Soundwave.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticon prisoners hijack the Elite Guard flagship, and Prime must sneak aboard to rescue them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: This Is Why I Hate Machines
programme.desc: A SpaceBridge mishap sends Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Ratchet must rescue him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Conscrash lands on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alex, Rad, and Carlos find the Exodus and are adopted by three Minicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The kids join the Autobots on a mission to find a newly awakened Minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: In Antarctica, Starscream loses a Minicon to an unexpected thief.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking. Who will reach it first?

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron blocks all radio waves and communications on Earth and makes his demands clear.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: A Decepticon Raider in King Auther's Court
programme.desc: Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons trick the population into believing they are "Sky Gods".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: S3 Quest Mode Bwah
programme.desc: Epic missions and wild challenges push Rabbids into full quest mode.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑ginnings
programme.desc: The Rabbids unleash their very first wave of chaos, kicking off nonstop mischief.

programme.title: S1 Summer Bwah‑cation
programme.desc: Sun, sand and total silliness as Rabbids turn summer into pure mayhe

programme.title: S1 Tech‑Tastrophe Rabbids
programme.desc: Gadgets glitch, machines revolt and Rabbids make every device go BWAH.

programme.title: S1 Lab Test Bwah‑nanza
programme.desc: Experiments explode into chaos as Rabbids turn science into slapstick.

programme.title: S1 Bwah‑Beats
programme.desc: Music, noise and DJ disasters collide in a rhythm‑fuelled Rabbid mess.

programme.title: Costume Mayhem & Masked Mischief
programme.desc: The Rabbids throw themselves into Carnival, mixing costumes, noise, and utter nonsense.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?! Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Happy New Year… Again!
programme.desc: Masha decides celebrating New Year once is not enough and goes to mysterious China, where dragons dance, gardens bloom and many, many more interesting things are happening!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: The Tops and the Roots
programme.desc: There was a village and a man, living in this village. In a deep forest near that village, the Bear settled in. The Bear asked the man for some tasty treats. The man gave the Bear two options of what he prefers to eat: the tops or the roots. The Bear decided to take the tops. The man grew a turnip and gave the tops to the Bear. The tops were tasteless. The Bear asked the man to try the turnip. The man agreed on the condition that the Bear will help him with the housework and keep off the flies. While chasing away the flies, the Bear accidentally hit the man on the nose. The Bear was scared and ran away into the forest, grabbing the turnip with him. Since then, people use to say “to be a fool for one's pains”.

programme.title: Ali Baba
programme.desc: This story is about one very kind, but very poor Ali-Baba and his rich but greedy brother Kasym. Once upon a time Ali-Baba overheard the magic spell, which opens up the magic cape with numerous treasures. These treasures were stolen by the thieves and kept in this cave. One day Ali-Baba met Kasym and told him the secret spell. Kasym got inside the cape, but accidentally forgot the spell and the thieves caught him. They forced Kasym to learn the whole book of fairy tales by heart and spend one thousand days and a thousand and one nights telling these stories to them. This story teaches us to study well and avoid cheating.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: Tom Thumb
programme.desc: This is a story about the small but brave boy. The moral of the story is that no matter how big and tall you are, you should not offend the little ones. It may happen so that you will meet some tom thumb boy, who will beat any “giant”.

programme.title: Wee Little Havroshechka
programme.desc: There lived a woman who had three daughters - two of her own and the stepdaughter called Wee Little Havroshechka. She loved her own daughters and hated the stepdaughter who was forced to work till dawn. No matter how hard she tried to please the stepmother, she was unapproachable. Once upon a time the stepmother kicked her out of the house, but every medal has its flipside – Wee Little Havroshechka met her Prince and they lived happily ever after, and it's all because she was hard-working and clean.

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Tour de Forest
programme.desc: Himalayan Bear is once again competing with Bear! This time they have arranged a bike race, but something doesn't smell right: Himalayan Bear intends on cheating to win! Good thing Masha stands as a guardian of justice and always comes to a friend's aid!

programme.title: What's Inside?
programme.desc: "What is inside such seemingly simple objects surrounding us? How are the mechanisms that we use every day arranged? Maybe they work with the help of magic? Or maybe each system has a certain order?In this episode, Masha decides to figure out how the objects surrounding her are arranged. And in the company of an old friend, this research becomes an adventure. "

programme.title: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction - a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize. But things didn't go according to plan. And now the main strongman of the forest cannot do without the help of his friends.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: First Day Of School
programme.desc: With the beginning of September, Masha, like all the children wants to go to school and asks the Bear to make her one. Overwhelmed with enthu-siasm, the Bear completes the task and the next day Masha sits at a brand new desk and tries to act as an attentive student but ends up bringing the Bear to absolute madness.

programme.title: Fishy story
programme.desc: Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However, everything is not so simple in our story. The Bear didn't even suspect what kind of adventure he was going to find on his fishing trip. While Masha and She-Bear frightened by his sudden disappearance, explore the neighborhood, he ... however, you will find out everything yourself in our new episode.

programme.title: Don't Wake Till Spring!
programme.desc: The autumn has arrived. The Bear prepares for his winter bedtime by barricading himself from Masha inside the house. But the little girl manages to find her way indoors and causes yet another mess by awakening a whole swarm of bees. But all her games eventually stop and when the Bear cooks some porridge to feed the child, he discovers her fallen asleep.

programme.title: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: At first time in her life Masha is frightened in earnest, however this creepy story shook up the whole forest and now hardly anyone can stay away from these strange scenes! And what would you do if your own pillow and blanket turn into real ghosts?! A real ghost story, oh yeah!

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: See You Later
programme.desc: This day will change Bear's life forever. To everyone's surprise, Masha has suddenly grown up, getting all the forest dwellers shocked by her exceptionally good behavior. Her sister Dasha is going to take her back to the big city, which really upsets the Bear and others.

programme.title: Traffic

programme.title: Hellboy

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Jane is a beautiful but troubled American girl backpacking her way through Hong Kong. When she successfully fends off three thugs trying to rob her, it draws the attention of Shu, a Wudang champion, who is impressed by her raw street fighting abilities. Shu recruits Jane and trains her to fight in the vicious, all-female, underground martial arts tournament known as The Kumite.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: In The Butterfly Effect Evan Treborn (Ashton Kutcher) has lost crucial moments of his life, his childhood scarred by a series of terrifying events he can't remember. When Evan realises that by reading his diaries he can unlock the past and go back in time, he tries to reclaim the missing memories by tampering with the past... with unexpected and disastrous results! The more Evan tampers with time, the more his life - and that of his friend Kayleigh (Amy Smart) - begin to unravel, and he discovers there is no such thing as a happy ending!

programme.title: A Family Man
programme.desc: From the Writer of The Accountant and Ozark comes an unforgettably moving drama with an all-star cast featuring Gerard Butler, Gretchen Mol, and Willem Dafoe. A head-hunter, desperate to climb to the top of the corporate ladder, grows distant from his family as his life increasingly revolves around closing deals in a survival-of-the-fittest boiler room. But these dreams suddenly grind to a halt when his son is diagnosed with a life-threatening illness.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Romulus v. Remus: The First King
programme.desc: Vikings meets Game of Thrones meets Apocolypto, this historical action epic is the legendary story of two brothers who battled to found the greatest empire history has ever known Rome. With stunning visuals and immersive epic battle scenes, follow Romulus and Remus as they escape captivity, battle sacred fire and violent warriors, leading one of them seal his fate as the chosen one.

programme.title: Into the Grizzly Maze

When a rogue grizzly bear wreaks havoc on a local Alaskan community, a sheriff must now hunt down the endangered bear he has spent his life protecting. Now lost in the labyrinthian Grizzly Maze, will he make it out alive?
